name: Lady of Dreamless Land
descriptionTemplate: Xu gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: The first time each type of Xu's Command Cards triggers the {Resonance} effect per turn, its Base Arithmetica Cost becomes 0.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Xu gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: The first time each type of Xu's Command Cards triggers the {Resonance} effect per turn, its Base Arithmetica Cost becomes 0. The max stack of {Spellbound} is increased to 15, and the first Command Card Xu plays each turn takes effect 1 additional time.
